UDAGToken","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"unpause","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"details":"Phase 1: bridge is inactive (pre-mainnet). Phase 2: bridge activates after mainnet launch.      Arbitrum\u2192Native: user escrows ERC-20 in bridge, relayers confirm native delivery, bridge burns. bridgeFromNative(bytes20,address,uint256.details: Only succeeds if enough relayers have signed the attestation.

params.bridgeNonce: The bridge nonce from the native chain.
params.nativeSender: The UltraDAG address that locked funds.
params.nativeTxHash: The transaction hash on UltraDAG native chain.
params.recipient: The Arbitrum address to receive tokens.
params.signatures: Concatenated relayer signatures (65 bytes each: r, s, v).

params.amount: Amount in sats (8 decimals). Must have approved this contract.

completeBridgeToNative(uint256,bytes).details: Burns the escrowed tokens. Requires relayer multi-sig confirmation.

params._governor: SHOULD be a TimelockController address for production deployments        to enforce a delay on governance actions and prevent instant malicious changes.

refundBridge(uint256).details: Only the original sender can call, after REFUND_TIMEOUT has elapsed.

acceptGovernance().notice: Accept governance. Only the pending governor can call.

activateBridge().notice: Activate the bridge. Can only be called once by governor.

bridgeFromNative(bytes20,address,uint256.notice: Complete a bridge transfer from UltraDAG native to Arbitrum.

bridgeToNative(bytes20,uint256).notice: Escrow UDAG tokens in the bridge for bridging to the UltraDAG native chain.

completeBridgeToNative(uint256,bytes).notice: Complete a bridge-to-native request after confirming native-side delivery.

pause().notice: Emergency pause. Any relayer can pause.

proposeGovernor(address).notice: Propose a new governor. Must be accepted by the new governor.

refundBridge(uint256).notice: Refund escrowed tokens if the bridge request was never completed.
